prompt: Generate a screenshot from flight simulator game. Show a A320 aircraft from a cockpit perspective, using the realistic style and UI overlay structure found in the reference flight simulator image.
prompt_refined: Generate a realistic screenshot from a flight simulator game, depicting an Airbus A320 aircraft from a cockpit perspective. The view should encompass a detailed cityscape under a clear blue sky with scattered clouds, with a portion of the A320's wing visible in the foreground, mirroring the overall visual style and vantage point of image 1. Overlay the scene with a user interface (UI) structured precisely like image 1, featuring: a circular heading indicator in the top-left corner, vertical airspeed and engine gauges in the bottom-left, and vertical altitude/vertical speed indicators alongside flap/trim controls in the bottom-right. Additionally, include text overlays for player IDs and other aircraft details in the top-middle area, maintaining the clean fonts and consistent color scheme (e.g., white text, green/blue indicators) as observed in image 1.
objects: Airbus A320 aircraft from a cockpit perspective
clear blue sky with scattered clouds
portion of A320's wing in the foreground
circular heading indicator in the top-left corner
vertical airspeed and engine gauges in the bottom-left
vertical altitude/vertical speed indicators in the bottom-right
text overlays for player IDs and other aircraft details in the top-middle area
